metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Why cybersecurity deserves priority. Cybercrime is no longer something that only affects large companies. Small and medium-sized enterprises in particular are increasingly becoming targets. Why? Because they are often less secure, even though they manage valuable data and resources.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Cybercrime is no longer something that only affects large companies. Small and medium-sized enterprises in particular are increasingly becoming targets. Why? Because they are often less secure, even though they manage valuable data and resources. A cyber attack can easily cause tens of thousands of euros in damage and often brings your business operations to a standstill.

text:
This way you are not only prepared for the dangers of today, but also for the challenges of tomorrow. Getting started with the MCZ subsidy in 5 steps
Step 1: Check if you qualify. Your company must meet three conditions. Maximum 50 employees, less than € 10 million annual turnover and a Chamber of Commerce registration. Step 2: Complete the CyberSafe Check.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text:
Getting started with the MCZ subsidy in 5 steps
Step 1: Check if you qualify. Your company must meet three conditions. Maximum 50 employees, less than € 10 million annual turnover and a Chamber of Commerce registration. Step 2: Complete the CyberSafe Check. The [CyberSafe Check](https://tools.digitaltrustcenter.nl/cyberveilig-check/) from the Digital Trust Center is mandatory.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

text: Your company must meet three conditions. Maximum 50 employees, less than € 10 million annual turnover and a Chamber of Commerce registration. Step 2: Complete the CyberSafe Check. The [CyberSafe Check](https://tools.digitaltrustcenter.nl/cyberveilig-check/) from the Digital Trust Center is mandatory. Complete this for the most relevant investments and download the advice as a PDF, without this document your application will be rejected.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen your digital resilience with the MCZ subsidy

Complete this for the most relevant investments and download the advice as a PDF, without this document your application will be rejected. Step 3: Invest smartly in your digital security.
